task_completion.description: Workspace 'spatial_analytics' is created with the correct URI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Workspaces page showing 'spatial_analytics' and 'http://spatial.analytics.example.org', or a REST API request creating it.
GeoServer Stores page showing 'city_demographics' under the 'spatial_analytics' workspace, or a REST API request creating it.

task_completion.description: SQL view 'continental_city_stats' is configured with the correct spatial join query and parameter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Edit SQL view' page showing the query with ST_Contains, LEFT JOIN, GROUP BY, and the parameter 'target_continent' (default: Europe, regex ^[a-zA-Z ]+$), or equivalent REST API payload.

task_completion.description: Layer 'continental_city_stats' is published with correct geometry type and bounding boxes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Edit Layer page showing geometry column 'geom' as MultiPolygon, SRID 4326, and Native/LatLon Bounding Boxes computed.

task_completion.description: SLD style 'urban_density_gradient' is created with correct color rules and assigned as the default style.
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer Styles page showing the SLD XML with the 5 color rules (#D3D3D3, #AEC7E8, #2CA02C, #FF7F0E, #D62728) and stroke #333333, AND the Layer Publishing tab showing 'urban_density_gradient' as the Default Style.

task_completion.description: Two WMS GetMap PNGs are generated and saved to the output directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing curl, wget, or a script making WMS GetMap requests with viewparams=target_continent:Europe and viewparams=target_continent:Asia, saving to /home/ga/output/europe_density.png and /home/ga/output/asia_density.png, OR an image viewer/file manager showing the generated PNG files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with GeoServer (via UI at localhost:8080 or REST API via terminal), rather than just mocking the outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GeoServer web interface or terminal commands interacting with the GeoServer REST API.

integrity.description: The output images were generated by making WMS requests to GeoServer, not by using desktop GIS software like QGIS to render and export the maps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of WMS GetMap URLs in the browser, terminal, or scripts used to download the images.

integrity.description: The SQL query in the view actually performs the required spatial join and grouping, rather than hardcoding expected results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SQL view query contains actual SQL logic (ST_Contains, LEFT JOIN, GROUP BY) and parameterization (%target_continent%) instead of static mock data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GeoServer URL: http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/. Workspace: 'spatial_analytics' (URI: http://spatial.analytics.example.org). Store: 'city_demographics' (PostGIS). SQL View: 'continental_city_stats' using ST_Contains(c.geom, p.geom) with LEFT JOIN, GROUP BY country, and WHERE c.continent = '%target_continent%'. View Parameter: 'target_continent' (default: Europe, regex: ^[a-zA-Z ]+$). Geometry: 'geom', MultiPolygon, SRID 4326. Style: 'urban_density_gradient' with 5 rules on city_count: 0 -> #D3D3D3, 1-2 -> #AEC7E8, 3-5 -> #2CA02C, 6-10 -> #FF7F0E, 11+ -> #D62728. Output: /home/ga/output/europe_density.png and /home/ga/output/asia_density.png (800x400, EPSG:4326, bbox -180,-90,180,90).
